description_long: This lamp features a minimalist pendant design with a black circular ceiling mount and three slender, evenly spaced suspension rods. At the lower end, three exposed bulbs are held in place by small, metallic gold or brass sockets, arranged in a compact triangular cluster. The rods are straight and evenly spaced, giving the lamp a balanced and modern appearance. The bulbs are fully visible, emphasizing an industrial or contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is lightweight and streamlined, suitable for urban interiors or modern public spaces. The combination of black and metallic gold/brass elements adds a touch of sophistication to the utilitarian form.
description: A modern pendant lamp with three exposed bulbs in gold/brass sockets, suspended by black rods from a circular ceiling mount. The design is minimalist and industrial, with a compact, triangular bulb arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the three suspension rods descending from a black ceiling mount, with the bulbs clustered closely at the bottom.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view reveals the triangular arrangement of the bulbs and the metallic sockets more clearly.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizes the linear alignment of the rods and the compact grouping of the bulbs at the base.
description_view_3: Another angled view, showing the symmetry of the rods and the even spacing of the bulbs in their sockets.
